did.head: DESCRIPTIVE SUMMARY
did.unittitle: Arthur D. Little, Inc. Ithaca urban renewal report,
did.repository: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library
did.abstract: 140 page bound mimeo volume entitled "The Economic Basis for Downtown Renewal: A Report to the City of Ithaca, New York," July 1961, prepared by Arthur D. Little, Inc.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: 140 page bound mimeo volume entitled "The Economic Basis for Downtown Renewal: A Report to the City of Ithaca, New York," July 1961, prepared by Arthur D. Little, Inc.

did.unittitle: 140 page bound mimeograph volume entitled "The Economic Basis for Downtown Renewal: A Report to the City of Ithaca, New York," July 1961, prepared by Arthur D. Little, Inc

userestrict.head: Restrictions on Use:
userestrict.p: Reportcannot to be reproduced wholly or in part over the signature of or in connection with the firm of Arthur D. Little, Inc. without their written permission.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Arthur D. Little, Inc. Ithaca urban renewal report, #3326. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
